name: LinkFinder AI — Post Reactions → Scrape Every Reactor's Profile

nodes.name: Set Post URL
nodes.notes:
✏️ Paste your LinkedIn post URL here.
Format: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:1234567890

You can find it by clicking '... → Copy link to post' on any LinkedIn post.

nodes.name: Linkfinder — Get Reactions
nodes.notes:
🔑 HTTP Header Auth credential:
  Name:  Authorization
  Value: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

Step 1: Gets the list of people who reacted to the post

nodes.name: Linkfinder — Scrape Each Profile
nodes.notes:
Step 2: Scrapes each reactor's full LinkedIn profile.

⚠️ Each profile costs credits. If you have many reactors, reduce the list in the previous node or use the simple reactions workflow instead.

nodes.name: Append to Leads Sheet
nodes.notes:
📋 Create a 'ReactorProfiles' tab with headers:
reaction_name | reaction_job_info | name | job_title | company | headline | location | country | industry | email | mobile | connections | is_employed | years_experience | linkedin_url
